anti_claim: This standard is a public-safe schema contract projection only; it does not authorize release, provider calls, private-data equivalence, or whole-system correctness.

anti_claim_contract.rule: fixture-backed proof must state what it does not prove

anti_claims: This public standard does not copy private source bodies or prove public runtime completeness.
This public standard does not authorize release, hosted-public readiness, publication, recipient work, provider calls, or private-data equivalence.

omission_receipt.reason: public standard carries schema and id refs only

omission_receipt_contract.rule: compressed views must list omitted bodies and drilldown refs

receipt_expectations: receipt must cite validator_id, input fixture ids, output artifact refs, omissions, and anti_claim ids

source_coupling_contract.rule: if generated or projected, record source input digest and stale-source behavior

standard_payload.anti_purpose: A slogan, posture claim, or release tagline.
failure_modes: untyped artifact admitted into rebuilt substrate
current public microcosm surface treated as sufficient without coverage check
private source material exposed instead of synthetic/schema-only fixture
projection claims source authority without coupling receipt
standard_payload.ontology: A root-level invariant that constrains what the substrate is allowed to call true or complete.
standard_payload.teleology: Give the rebuilt public roof a small, load-bearing law set derived from repeated patterns.

validation_rules: validate required fields and enum values against this standard
reject missing source_refs unless the fixture declares synthetic origin
reject authority upgrades not backed by receipt_refs
source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown/mermaid/atlas are generated projections of this JSON source.

field_semantics.provenance: optional origin note, never an evidence gate

instance_schema.note: Axioms are imposed, not derived. Provenance is optional; proof is NOT required to admit an axiom.

lattice_edges.note: Root constitutional law. Imposed and substantive; carries no upward edge and never requires proof.

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing axiom without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_axiom and propagate through every governed artifact + projection

atlas_card.surface: agent entry / option-surface band / atlas card
atlas_card.note: agent-routing projection; must link back to JSON source

link_resolution.rule: every required/selective lattice edge target must resolve to an existing instance id OR be marked planned

projection_freshness.rule: generated markdown/mermaid/atlas must be regenerable from JSON source; a stale projection is a trust downgrade, not source authority

compression.purpose: one_line drives the compressed per-instance row projection (e.g. the 77-organ atlas) for agent entry + routing

provisional_policy.axiom_posture: imposed constitutional commitment; provenance optional; never evidence-gated
provisional_policy.candidate_lane: candidate/provisional doctrine may exist ONLY in an explicit import/drafting lane OUTSIDE public source, never as a shipped public-doctrine status
provisional_policy.overrides: macro candidate-axiom 'pressure only / not active law' posture does NOT apply to shipped microcosm public doctrine

axiom_payload_contract.purpose: Define the law calculus every axiom instance, routing row, principle grounding, and projection obeys. Gives the named-but-undefined required_fields entry 'axiom_payload' a shape, additively, without altering required_fields or instance_schema.

schema_reconciliation.required_fields_axiom_payload: Satisfied by an object conforming to this contract (admission_contract + formal_model.obligations + support_contract + projection_contract).
schema_reconciliation.instance_schema_relationship: instance_schema.required_keys [id, kind, statement, status] remain the minimal admission record; axiom_payload is the support/derivation envelope layered on top, not a replacement.
schema_reconciliation.authority_posture: additive_v2; required_fields and instance_schema preserved verbatim

admission_contract.anti_claim: Admission as root law is not evidence that the axiom is witnessed, strong, complete, enforced, or release-authorizing.

support_contract.ax12_reconciliation: AX-12 holds because the CLAIM that an axiom is witnessed/strong passes the same admissibility relation (AX-1) as any external claim; only admission-as-law is exempt from proof.

formal_model.note: Each axiom formal_clause decomposes into required obligations. coverage_tag is COMPUTED by the cover evaluator, never hand-asserted (hand-stamping a tag is the AP-1 label-echo this calculus forbids). 'unknown' (AX-6 out-of-declared-domain) is a coverage tag, NOT a support value, and is kept distinct from 'blocked' (AX-5 fail-closed: an in-domain required obligation with no admissible witness).

evidence_ceiling_lattice.rank_laundering_guard: The display rank is a projection of the ceiling vector; a high evidence_class must never launder authority in an uncovered provenance/freshness/scope component.

support_case_shape.purpose: Standard-owned ABI for the support cases compiled by validator.microcosm.axiom_support_cover, so the evaluator code does not become a hidden de-facto schema (AX-11 executable grammar before authority; AX-12 the evaluator obeys the same floor).
forbidden: a principle ref on the witness path
a generated projection used as its own source evidence
support_case_shape.anti_claim: A schema-valid support case is a citation/attestation envelope, not an admissible support cover. Admissibility additionally requires resolved refs, owner-backed ordered dimensions, passing negative gates, and basis compatibility.

ceiling_dimension_owner_contract.purpose: Each ceiling component must name a real order owner in the source registry before it contributes to support; unowned components stay unknown and never launder authority.

order_owned.freshness_state: core/axiom_support_ceiling_dimensions.json::components[freshness_state] -> core/axiom_support_freshness_state_order.json::order_values; current value is an ordered unknown until a source refresh contract exists
order_owned.negative_case_status: core/axiom_support_ceiling_dimensions.json::components[negative_case_status] -> core/axiom_organ_routing.json::rows[].negative_case_codes resolved against the bound checker/test surfaces; order absent < declared_only < referenced_in_bound_checker

ceiling_dimension_owner_contract.unknown_dimension_policy: A component can be order-owned and still compute an unknown or unverified value. unknown_no_order_owner is reserved for missing source order owners; ordered unknown values such as freshness_state remain witness gaps and cannot become strong.
ceiling_dimension_owner_contract.anti_claim: Adding or source-registering a dimension order is evaluator grammar, not release authority; a high component cannot launder authority across an unknown component.

anti_axiom_rejection_contract.purpose: A negative case is not merely a code/path; 'strong' (per strength_scale) requires the named anti-axiom to be REJECTED. The rejection judgment is tracked as a separate axis from positive support (a bilattice-style split): an obligation can have positive witness debt while its anti-axiom has independent rejection evidence, and vice versa.
anti_axiom_rejection_contract.rejection_requires_mapping: No tier above certifies per-obligation rejection. organ_receipt_coverage_present means a witness organ's first-wave validation receipt records a complete passing negative-case suite, but mapping that endpoint/shape coverage to a specific obligation's anti-axiom slice (e.g. AX-8.O1 general propagation vs endpoint catches) must be verified before 'strong'. Until verified, mapping_verified is false.

anti_axiom_rejection_mapping_shape.purpose: Map receipt-observed negative-case coverage to a specific obligation's anti-axiom slice without laundering organ-level or endpoint coverage into general rejection.
anti_axiom_rejection_mapping_shape.strong_gate_rule: Strong requires positive support and verified anti-axiom rejection for every required obligation under a compatible basis. exact_obligation_rejection is sufficient only when declared by a standard-owned mapping rule; subsumes_obligation is sufficient only when the mapping row explicitly says it is standard-declared and conflict-free.
anti_axiom_rejection_mapping_shape.source_owned_mapping_row_rule: The evaluator must consume source-owned mapping rows before any code-inferred fallback. Non-exact relations such as unmapped, illustrative_only, and partial_overlap remain non-certifying and must keep mapping_verified false.
forbidden: endpoint coverage treated as general propagation proof
generated support-cover output read back as source evidence
anti_axiom_rejection_mapping_shape.anti_claim: The mapping subview is a read-only evaluator projection over source rows and receipts. It can expose partial or illustrative overlap, but it cannot certify exact or subsuming rejection without a declared source-owned mapping row.

anti_axiom_rejection_contract.anti_claim: Organ-level negative-case coverage must never launder into per-obligation anti-axiom rejection; endpoint coverage is not propagation rejection.

cover_calculus.support_obligation_rule: support(O) = join over admissible support cases binding O of ceiling(case); blocked if none in declared domain
cover_calculus.support_axiom_rule: support(A) = join over VALID covers S (sets of cases whose union covers the required obligations, mutually compatible under one basis/domain, negative gates satisfied, refs resolved-or-layer_debt) of (meet over case in S of ceiling(case))
cover_calculus.support_principle_rule: support(P) is bounded by the covers of the SPECIFIC axiom obligations grounding P, never by whole-axiom labels
cover_calculus.support_projection_rule: claim_ceiling(projection) <= meet(source_support, freshness, provenance, grammar_validity, anti_claim_floor)
cover_calculus.boundedness: Covers are finite, basis-digested, and non-recursive; the generated coverage projection is never readmitted as its own source evidence (AX-12 reflexivity is self-report, not circular proof).

substrate_reciprocity_contract.purpose: Make the bidirectional law/substrate route explicit without turning substrate examples into proof of law. Axioms determine substrate through governance/constrained-by edges; substrate determines future axiom refinement only by source-owned obligation, witness, negative-case, and layer-debt changes.
non_laundering_rules: governance edges do not compute support
witness organs and negative cases are support inputs, not support claims
generated projections are never source evidence
substrate feedback may refine obligation grammar and claim ceilings but cannot silently de-admit an axiom

anti_inflation_contract.witness_vs_constraint: Witness edges (witness_organs / support cases) COMPUTE an obligation and stay rare; broad coverage uses organ.constrained_by.axiom / *.abides_by.axiom governance edges with edge_justification_required.
anti_inflation_contract.count_theater_guard: More examples raise support ONLY by covering an uncovered required obligation, raising a sub-maximal ceiling component, or adding a missing negative-case gate; redundant cases under the same basis/checker are inert.

migration_contract.authority_flip_rule: microcosm-substrate/axioms/*.json may become source authority ONLY after a projection-parity validator and receipts prove equivalence to the routing source of record
migration_contract.until_parity: routing JSON remains source_of_record; AXIOMS.md and generated coverage remain projections below it

pilot_status.evaluator_status: validator.microcosm.axiom_support_cover LANDED v0: computes support verdicts, principle support, candidate pressure, per-obligation claim ceilings, support cases, and all eight source-owned ceiling dimensions. Freshness remains an ordered unknown until a source-owned refresh contract exists, and anti-axiom rejection mapping remains separate from positive support.

axiom_payload_contract.advisory_inputs: Type B pressure (SACM/PROV/SLSA/in-toto/PCC/Lean/semiring-provenance) shaped this contract; the load-bearing core is the obligation-cover calculus and the admission/support split, not the external standards.

refinement_provenance.method: additive_envelope_merge; required_fields/authority_ceiling/anti_claims preserved verbatim; envelope landed as new keys (not via required_fields)
